response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of solid software engineering and entrepreneurial experience, demonstrating strong technical craftsmanship and leadership in open-source communities. However, the role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy and AI-powered product development. His AI experience appears limited to a single recent role working on agent infrastructure, which does not align with the senior strategic, AI-focused advisory requirements of this specific position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Strong commitment to engineering craftsmanship, evidenced by creating testing frameworks, running workshops, and giving conference talks.
concerns: Lacks the required recognized expertise and sustained track record in artificial intelligence and machine learning strategy.
Corporate experience maxes out at the Staff level, falling short of the Director-level strategic advisory expectations.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
